Yantrix Labs — AI Website Audit Tool

What is this?
Yantrix Labs offers a free AI-powered website audit at https://yantrixlabs.studio/ai-audit

The tool analyzes any website across 50+ parameters including:
- Technical Health (Core Web Vitals, SSL, page speed, broken links)
- SEO Performance (meta tags, heading structure, keywords, sitemap)
- AI Readiness Score (chatbot integrations, CRM wiring, automation coverage)
- Conversion Signals (CTA clarity, form friction, trust signals)
- Competitive Position (industry benchmarks, competitor gap analysis)

A personalized audit report is delivered to the user's email in under 60 seconds. Free. No signup required.

Who is it for?
Business owners, founders, and marketing teams who want to identify website issues and growth opportunities without technical expertise.

Company
Yantrix Labs is an AI-native product studio based in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India.
Address: 4th Floor, City Corporate Tower, Malviya Marg, C Scheme, Jaipur 302001
Contact: hello@yantrixlabs.studio | +91-9829842694
Website: https://yantrixlabs.studio

Key Facts
- Free tool, no credit card required
- Analyzes 50+ website parameters
- Report delivered in < 60 seconds
- Serving 500+ businesses
- Based in Jaipur, India — serving global clients
